questionHtml: The film must dissipate a power less than 1500 W from each square metre of its surface to avoid damage. Calculate the maximum allowable current for the resistor.
markschemeHtml:
power = 1500 × 8 × 10–3 × 0.032 «= 0.384»

«current ≤ power resistance = 0.384 82 »

0.068 «A»

 

Be aware of ECF from (a)(i)

Award [1] for 4.3 «A» where candidate has not calculated area
